# Testing

## Server

Server socket bound to address: 0.0.0.0, port: 8080
Server started. Listening on port 8080...

## Client

jackcrane@Jacks-MacBook-Air 4530-project-3-part-2 % cd Client
jackcrane@Jacks-MacBook-Air Client % ./client_executable
Client's Public Key: 
Encrypted public key sent to server.
